predictedBugs: Cache collision when two projects share the same root path due to absolute path normalization differences

Guard evaluation context missing activeFeature when engine.initialize() receives inspection but buildContext creates a fresh minimal inspection instead of using stored one (fixed by storing lastInspection)
Checkpoint file corruption during atomic write if process crashes between tmp write and rename — handled via atomicWrite utility which uses fs.rename (atomic on same filesystem)
edgeCases: Empty .devflow/workflow-states.yaml should throw a clear error message
Corrupted checkpoint.json (invalid JSON) should return null, not crash the engine
V1 state.json (no schemaVersion field) should be auto-migrated to v2 without data loss
